/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/musicians_canvas_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/musicians_canvas_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/trackwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/trackconfigdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/settingsdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/waveformwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/midivisualizationwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/midisynth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/themeutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/audioutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/trackdata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/musicians_canvas.dir/src/appsettings.cpp.o -o musicians_canvas  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfluidsynth.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librtmidi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.9.2
